name: Terran League
subtitle: The Last Bastion
desc: Humanity's last organized military force. Versatile combined-arms generalists who win through adaptability, logistics, and the refusal to die.

name: Eternal Shards
subtitle: The Dying Light
desc: The galaxy's most ancient civilization, facing extinction. Few but devastating elite units that flicker through reality to dodge incoming fire.

name: Scrap-Horde
subtitle: The Rust Tide
desc: Anarchic scavengers who build from garbage. Every death on the battlefield — friend or foe — makes surviving Horde units stronger.

name: Necro-Legion
subtitle: The Undying Protocol
desc: Ancient machine intelligences that transferred consciousness into living-metal 100,000 years ago. Their fallen stand back up. Their patience is geological.

name: Unity Accord
subtitle: The Burning Covenant
desc: Precision coalition military unified under a rigid caste system. One hit marks the target for the entire army's devastating coordinated fire.

name: Vorax
subtitle: The Devouring Swarm
desc: Extra-galactic biological horror. Consumes civilizations and evolves their technology into new organisms. Cannot be negotiated with. Hunger given form.

name: Core Guardians
subtitle: The Silent Gods
desc: Aethyn-created sentient AI constructs. Guard the Reclamation Engine at the Nexus. Their deaths chain-react into cascading explosions. Energy weapons HEAL them.
